records.function: Navigate General, Connections, Model routing, Voice & audio, Shortcuts, Prompts & context, Advanced, and About pages.
records.production_entry_point: Settings navigation QListWidget mouse clicks
success_assertions: Every visible navigation row selects the corresponding real Settings page.
records.audit_note: All eight current pages are selected through Qt mouse input.

records.function: Search Settings and jump to matching fields.
records.production_entry_point: Settings search QLineEdit keyboard input
success_assertions: A matching query leaves only the owning page, a no-match query leaves none, and clear restores every page.
records.audit_note: Uses real keyboard events and visible page state.

records.function: Load a built-in configuration profile.
records.production_entry_point: Settings Profiles menu Low setup QAction -> Save changes -> config reload -> Settings reopen
success_assertions: The built-in profile becomes visibly selected, persists as the active default profile, reaches runtime routing, and reopens with all three model routes.
records.audit_note: Low setup is the only built-in profile currently exposed by the production menu.

records.function: Create/save a custom profile.
records.production_entry_point: Onboarding profile fields/buttons and Settings Save changes button
success_assertions: Two profiles persist independently and the selected profile reloads with its edited model.
records.audit_note: Uses visible Qt controls and a real isolated settings file.

records.function: Rename a custom profile.
records.production_entry_point: Settings profile menu Rename profile action
success_assertions: The renamed profile label is visible and persisted.
records.audit_note: Uses the real menu action; only the modal text response is supplied by the test.

records.function: Delete a custom profile.
records.production_entry_point: Settings profile menu Delete profile action
success_assertions: Deleting inactive and final profiles updates disk, active selection, and the visible profile label.
records.audit_note: Uses the real menu action; only the confirmation response is supplied by the test.

records.function: Run the setup check from Settings.
records.production_entry_point: Settings Run setup check button -> core.setup_check.run_setup_check -> report dialog
success_assertions: Pass and warning check rows are rendered with their messages and recommendations while Settings remains usable.
records.audit_note: Host provider/microphone probes are deterministic external boundaries; the Settings action and report formatter are real.

records.function: Run the guided profile setup from Settings.
records.production_entry_point: Settings Run profile setup button -> OnboardingWizard
success_assertions: Clean Settings opens the visible guided wizard; dirty Settings blocks it until pending changes are resolved.
records.audit_note: The Settings entry and both clean/dirty branches are real; existing profile workflows cover completed wizard persistence.

records.function: Save settings changes.
records.production_entry_point: SettingsDialog Save changes button click
success_assertions: Changed values are serialized, the callback identifies them, and a fresh dialog reloads them.
records.audit_note: Uses a real Qt button and real settings serializer against isolated disk state.

records.function: Cancel/discard settings changes.
records.production_entry_point: Settings Cancel button mouse click
success_assertions: Cancel closes Settings and both clean and dirty cancellation leave the real settings file unchanged after reopen.
records.audit_note: Covers clean and unsaved-change states.

records.function: Reset only the current Settings page.
records.production_entry_point: Settings navigation row -> Reset Page button -> confirmation -> scoped env rewrite -> live reload
success_assertions: Each of the eight pages resets only its owned state, preserves every sentinel on other pages, reloads, and stays selected.
records.audit_note: Parameterized over every current Settings page, including the About no-setting branch.

records.function: Reset every setting after confirmation.
records.production_entry_point: Settings Reset All button -> confirmation -> keychain/OAuth cleanup -> env deletion -> config reload
success_assertions: The isolated settings file disappears, runtime defaults return, both credential entries are deleted, all three OAuth sessions clear, and Settings stays usable.
records.audit_note: Keychain and OAuth stores are external deterministic boundaries; destructive persistence is real but isolated.

records.function: Choose System, Light, or Dark theme.
records.production_entry_point: Theme combo selection -> Settings Save changes button
success_assertions: System, Light, and Dark each persist, invoke theme application, and reload selected.
records.audit_note: Parameterized over every supported Theme mode.

records.function: Customize background, surface, text, and accent colors.
records.production_entry_point: Theme color fields -> Settings Save changes -> config reload -> application stylesheet
success_assertions: Four distinct custom palettes persist and the active application stylesheet uses the saved background color.
records.audit_note: Exercises every theme color role through real fields and the production live-apply callback.

records.function: Customize icon size.
records.production_entry_point: Icon size field -> Settings Save changes -> UI-host reload -> existing IconOverlay
success_assertions: Every tested icon size persists and changes both dimensions of the already-running icon surface.
records.audit_note: Covers compact, normal, and large sizes through the real live-apply chain.

records.function: Customize bubble width, line count, and font size.
records.production_entry_point: Bubble width/lines/font fields -> Save -> UI-host reload -> existing SpeechBubble.apply_config
success_assertions: Compact through roomy geometry values persist and update the live bubble width, line capacity, and font.
records.audit_note: The four compound profiles exercise the shared geometry branch without replacing Wisp internals.

records.function: Customize bubble background, text, and spoken-word highlight colors.
records.production_entry_point: Bubble color fields -> Save -> UI-host reload -> existing SpeechBubble.apply_config
success_assertions: Background including alpha, text, and spoken-word colors persist and become the live bubble QColor values.
records.audit_note: All three bubble color roles are asserted after the production live-apply callback.

records.function: Enable or disable bubble wheel scrolling and spoken-line snap-back.
records.production_entry_point: Wheel-scroll and snap-back checkboxes -> Save -> live SpeechBubble behavior flags
success_assertions: All four scroll-enabled x snap-enabled combinations persist and reach the live bubble.
records.audit_note: Uses the complete 2 x 2 boolean interaction matrix.

records.function: Set bubble text reveal speed and held fast-forward speed.
records.production_entry_point: Normal/held reveal-speed fields -> Save -> live SpeechBubble reveal mode
success_assertions: Normal and speed-boosted branches each use their saved WPM across low and high profiles.
records.audit_note: Asserts both production speed branches after real settings reload.

records.function: Set bubble display/auto-hide delay and scroll snap delay.
records.production_entry_point: Display/snap delay fields -> Save -> live SpeechBubble timers
success_assertions: Minimum, normal, and long delays persist, respect the 500 ms bound, and update the existing timers.
records.audit_note: Covers the input boundary and multiple valid timer states.

records.function: Choose app UI language: system, English, Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Spanish, or French.
records.production_entry_point: App-language combo -> repeated Save changes -> live Qt translator and Settings navigation
success_assertions: System, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Spanish, and French each persist and leave all eight Settings pages navigable.
records.audit_note: Exercises the complete 6-language x 8-page matrix through real combo, button, and navigation events.

records.function: Choose assistant reply language or match the user's language.
records.production_entry_point: Assistant-language combo -> repeated Save changes -> config.get_system_prompt
success_assertions: Every offered reply-language state persists and produces the exact runtime language instruction, including match-user and system-default branches.
records.audit_note: The downstream provider request matrix is still pending; this accepts the real Settings-to-runtime-prompt behavior only.

records.function: Edit separate Wisp, ChatGPT, and Claude system prompts.
records.production_entry_point: Three system-prompt editors -> Save changes -> config reload -> Settings reopen
success_assertions: Distinct Wisp, ChatGPT, and Claude prompts persist, reload independently, and reach their separate runtime config values.
records.audit_note: Conversation-engine routing interactions remain pending; persistence and runtime separation are accepted.
